session.user: Run pytest on the following test files and report results: 1. pytest tests/artifacts/test_orphan_cleanup.py tests/artifacts/test_orphans.py -v Report the full output.
session.assistant: I'll run pytest on the specified test files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on artifact cleanup and orphans tests
